findings.title: Mode 3 uses the real minotari_payment_processor
findings.recommendation: Keep PP failures visible as benchmark output rather than bypassing the service.

findings.title: Genesis and birthday scans require birthday-encoded seeds
findings.recommendation: Use generated seeds and rewrite birthday for scan setup instead of RescanWallet(0).

findings.title: Mempool acceptance is not benchmark success
findings.recommendation: Verify claimed successful transactions with status value 6 before publishing throughput.

findings.title: FundsPending can live outside reported balances
findings.recommendation: Use chain-advance settlement gates between planned spend rounds; do not retry failed sends.

findings.title: Pinned Mode 2 library path is single-recipient for direct sends
findings.recommendation: Use the real multi-recipient CLI/API path when available and record unsupported behavior explicitly.

findings.title: Payment processor batches can stall behind one locked UTXO
findings.recommendation: Preserve PENDING_BATCHING/insufficient-funds states as benchmark signal.

findings.title: Console wallet recovery uses mnemonic birthday over the birthday flag
findings.recommendation: Rewrite only the mnemonic birthday for birthday scans while preserving wallet keys and address.
